channel.title: About on Zekeriya AY
channel.description: Recent content in About on Zekeriya AY

item.title: Blog
item.description: Blog All my blog posts can be found on my awesome blog.zekeriyaay.com. Arduino Nano & nRF24L01 ile Walkie-Talkie [TR] Making walkie-talkie, push-to-talk radio with Arduino, nRF24L01 post ➔

item.title: Certificates
item.description: Certificates Year Title Links Jul 2022 Cloud-Delivered Security Services Cert Jun 2022 Threat Hunting Workshop 4.0 Cert May 2022 Turkish Airlines Technology Cyber Take-Off 2022 Cert Feb 2022 CyberOps Associate Cert • Badge Jan 2022 CCNA: Introduction to Networks Cert • Badge Nov 2021 NDG Linux Unhatched Cert Sep 2021 Etik Hacker Olma Cert • Badge Apr 2021 Introduction to Cybersecurity Cert • Badge Dec 2020 Etik Hacker Olmak: Web Sızma Testleri ve Bug Bounty Cert • Badge Jun 2020 Mobility Fundamentals Cert

item.title: Education
item.description: Education Cyber Security Trainee Turkish Airlines Technology Cyber Take-Off 2022 May 2022 - July 2022 Istanbul 7/24 Camp - 120+ hours Active Directory Threat Hunting Mobile Pentest CTI K8s & Cloud Security Forensics Network Security Reverse Engineering Web Pentest Online Edu. - 140+ hours Operating Systems Information Security Cryptology Web Security Python Regulation(KVKK, GDPR, PCI-DSS) TK Certificates Cyber Security Analyst Trainee Akbank, SabancıDX, Cisco Networking Academy, Ağ Yöneticileri Derneği October 2021 - March 2022

item.title: Experiences
item.description: Experiences Cyber Security Specialist Turkish Airlines Technology September 2022 - Present Vulnerability Management Vulnerability Scanning Vulnerability Reporting System Administrator BUÜ Computer Engineering Department January 2022 - Present I work in the installation and management of servers such as authorization, virtualization(Proxmox), remote desktop connection… Proxmox VE GNU/Linux Authorization suserguide: User Guide to using servers janus: Login/Logout script to Eduroam network via CLI for GUI-less GNU/Linux systems Cyber Threat Intelligence Intern BGA Security

item.title: Projects
item.description: Projects All my projects can be found on my awesome GitHub. c-honeypot Open the vulnerable port with c-honeypot’s and monitor the activities of the attackers using the c-honeypot-adminpanel Python Socket Flask co-developed with selmankon dlk aka dalak Minimalist Kali Linux Docker image with xRDP & GUI Docker Kali Linux webcrawler3003 Website mapping and information gathering tool via GUI Python PyQt Multi-threading co-developed with selmankon janus Login/Logout script to BUÜ Eduroam network via CLI

item.title: Uses
item.description: Uses This is not a complete list of everything, but some of the tools I most enjoy using. Hardware M2 Macbook Air 13.6" 2022 Logitech MX Keys Mini Lenovo L29W-30 29" 21:9 Ultrawide Monitor MacOS Apps iTerm2 powerlevel10k Fig AltTab Rectangle Xnip TG Pro MonitorControl OpenInTerminal Lite SmoothScroll
